violations.description: LIGHTING (1 pts): One of the lights in the bakery walk in cooler noted missing.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some vent covers and ceiling areas in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Inside of reach in coolers and other food equipment noted in need of cleaning.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors in the kitchen area noted in need of cleaning. Shelving by the steam bath noted in need of cleaning. Shelving in the walk in cooler by the bakery noted in need of cleaning. Inside and outside of cupboards in the customer self service and trash disposal area noted in need of cleaning.
LIGHTING (1 pts): One of the lighs in the bakery area walk in cooler noted missing.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Vent covers in food prep area and in walk in coolers and freezer noted in need of cleaning. Floors behind and under equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Walk in cooler by the bakery noted with the gasket in need of replacement.
